Fear and Greed is at
16
(Extreme
Fear)
and BTC is at
$59K.
Bitcoin is opening Q3 still pinned below $60,000 after its worst
monthly performance of the cycle, with analysts warning the
current tight range around $59K to $60K historically precedes
sharper moves.

But the biggest news overnight has nothing to do with Bitcoin's
price. More than 140 companies just launched a rival to USDC, and
Circle's stock fell 17% in response. The stablecoin
infrastructure race just entered a completely new phase.

Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

The SEC Just Opened a Review of Crypto ETF Rules

The SEC launched a 60-day public comment period on June 30,
asking whether its ETF approval framework needs updating for
crypto and prediction market funds. SEC Chair Paul Atkins framed
it as keeping US markets growing.

The agency has approved dozens of crypto ETFs since Atkins took
office in April 2025.

What types of new funds has the SEC already approved that
prompted this review?

Read More  
( https://link.coinmarketcap.com/f/a/fZR8RrfzatbUZBSBQPLmbQ~~/AAQRxRA~/nd4Ssi7o_C-uO6KCbBLDZomM_H-EPlx_6G5PJC0z_KxzdJ6saSkjveraTawgCjhPpjoE7TMxYMs9E5Kp2gWW-wO0oAs-35S96rwax1gIiQylRNuHqKpgxTyLUvIkgRKnC3tgOhThmPvJZEcMHELHnRVdvQvJH_Nhdppvvn67aBs~ )
   MetaMask Now Lets You Earn Yield on Your Stablecoin Balance

MetaMask launched Money Account, combining stablecoin yield,
card spending, and trading in a single

https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/why-you-should-almost-always-look-bright-side-life-the-economist-c1tve?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3B8WMttM4bRpy8gR01Vm34HA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2tE0eOqWkXqIk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mr1vyaag~uh-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mr1vyaag-uh
  
Sign up for free here to receive this newsletter in your inbox every Saturday. You’ll also get our weekly newsletter with an exclusive introduction from our editor-in-chief. Optimism can go too far. Unrealistic starting expectations make it more likely that projects will miss budgets and deadlines. Optimism prevailed among bankers in the run-up to the 2007-09 financial crisis. Then, suddenly, it didn’t. But it also pays to be an optimist. Upbeat types tend to rise up organisational ladders and to found businesses; they even enjoy better health. The standard psychological test for measuring how optimistic or pessimistic people are is a short questionnaire called the Revised Life Orientation Test, which features statements such as “If something can go wrong for me, it will.” Would you follow someone who strongly believes that they are cursed? Pessimism has its place, but it is optimism that makes things happen. To read more about the practicalities and pitfalls of the workplace, you can sign up to the Bartleby newsletter. And to learn how to make the most of generative AI in your organisation, listen to the third season of Boss Class, our newly award-winning podcast on how to be a great manager. 75293.subject: Visa, Stripe & 140 companies launch Open USD to rewrite who profits from stablecoins 🪙; ChatGPT linked your bank …
75293.body:
View this post on the web at https://linas.substack.com/p/fintechpulse1096

Hey Everyone,
Good morning & happy Wednesday! Today’s issue is super hot as we’re diving into Visa, Stripe, and 140 companies, which just launched Open USD to rewrite stablecoin economics (what Open Standard & OUSD is all about, why it matters, and what it means for the future of finance & fintech + bonus deep dives into Circle, Coinbae and the ultimate list of stables resources [ https://substack.com/redirect/bec99081-032a-494c-a5c2-7e57f0e9b2a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] inside), AI giant OpenAI that just proved it can get users to hand over their financial data voluntarily (what expanding access to personal finance feature for ChatGPT tells us & which fintechs are now the most vulnerable + bonus dive into OpenAI’s Super App Strategy [ https://substack.com/redirect/59c46e6d-7e6f-48b3-b0a3-6c0e2c2081a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] and The Founders Playbook for Winning Attention in the AI Age [ https://substack.com/redirect/8e9bc84f-ff12-4925-8ad8-474b27341bb9?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] inside), and Claude Fable 5, which is now officially returning tomorrow (what the return of Anthropic’s most powerful LLM tells us & why the first federal AI recall already changed everything + bonus Mythos 5 Prompting Playbook [ https://substack.com/redirect/e0777bc4-4b71-4786-8775-3ae31a6b1e2a?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] & how to Unlock Claude Fable 5 Lite on Claude Opus 4.8 [ https://substack.com/redirect/4e20d29f-2232-4114-b607-e572be49ec37?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] inside). So let’s just jump straight into the finnovative stuff 🌶️
Visa, Stripe, and 140 companies launch Open USD to rewrite who profits from stablecoins 😳🪙
The BIG News 🔥 Yesterday, 140 companies that collectively touch most of the world’s payment volume decided they’d rather own the stablecoin than rent it.
Open USD, backed by Visa, Mastercard, Stripe, BlackRock, BNY Mellon, Coinbase [ https://substack.com/redirect/19da5ee4-da2d-4fe0-9607-afb48fb6cdd0?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], Shopify, Rakuten, and DoorDash, among many others, is a new dollar-pegged stablecoin built around one inversion: the partners who drive adoption capture nearly all the reserve yield, not the issuer.
Zero mint and redemption fees. No volume caps.
No wonder Circle’s [ https://substack.com/redirect/b31cc7b3-574f-4b71-b7c5-a940253703e5?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] $CRCL  stock dropped nearly 14% within hours…
So let’s take a closer look at this and break down the real economics behind Open USD, what each type of partner stands to gain, why JPMorgan and the largest U.S. banks are assembling a rival stablecoin bloc, and the three signals that will tell you whether O
